hadiths.arabic: بُنِيَ الإِسْلَامُ عَلَى خَمْسٍ: شَهَادَةِ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ، وَإِقَامِ الصَّلَاةِ، وَإِيتَاءِ الزَّكَاةِ، وَالْحَجِّ، وَصَوْمِ رَمَضَانَ
hadiths.transliteration: Buniya al-Islaamu 'alaa khamsin: shahaadati an laa ilaaha illallaahu wa anna Muhammadan Rasulullah, wa iqaamis-salaati, wa eetaa'iz-zakaati, wal-hajji, wa sawmi Ramadaan
hadiths.translation: Islam is built upon five pillars: testifying that there is no god but Allah and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah, performing the prayers, paying the Zakat, making the pilgrimage to the House, and fasting in Ramadan.

hadiths.arabic: لاَ يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى أَكُونَ أَحَبَّ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ وَالِدِهِ وَوَلَدِهِ وَالنَّاسِ أَجْمَعِينَ
hadiths.transliteration: Laa yu'minu ahadukum hattaa akoona ahabba ilaihi min waalidinhi wa waladihi wan-naasi ajma'een
hadiths.translation: None of you will have faith till he loves me more than his father, his children and all mankind.

hadiths.arabic: أَفْضَلُ الإِسْلَامِ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
hadiths.transliteration: Afdalul-Islaami man salimal-Muslimoona min lisaanihi wa yadihi
hadiths.translation: The best of Muslims is the one from whose tongue and hand other Muslims are safe.

hadiths.arabic: الإِيمَانُ بِضْعٌ وَسِتُّونَ شُعْبَةً، وَالْحَيَاءُ شُعْبَةٌ مِنَ الإِيمَانِ
hadiths.transliteration: Al-eemaanu bid'un wa sittoona shu'bah, wal-hayaa'u shu'batun minal-eemaan
hadiths.translation: Faith consists of more than sixty branches, and modesty is a branch of faith.
